user_query:
I need a small, cron-compatible daily pipeline set up in this workspace to help me prep our weekly gender-and-culture research check-in. Please use the provided sample data under input/raw and the schema in input/schema.json. Deliverables and requirements:

1) Aggregation script (command-line runnable): Create a script that I can run from the terminal to process all CSV files in input/raw. It should:
   - Validate every input row against input/schema.json and produce a machine-readable report at output/tests/schema_report.json indicating schema_status (PASS/FAIL) and any violations.
   - Compute the total responses and the gender mix per region across all input files combined. Write the result to output/aggregates/gender_mix.csv with columns exactly: region,gender,responses,share. Sort by region ascending then gender ascending. Compute share as responses / total_per_region rounded to 3 decimals.

2) Test/validation command: Provide a command I can run that compares output/aggregates/gender_mix.csv to the gold file input/expected/gender_mix_expected.csv and writes a diff report to output/tests/diff.txt. The diff_status (PASS if identical, otherwise FAIL) must be added to output/tests/schema_report.json alongside schema_status so I can see both in one place.

3) Scheduled execution setup: Create a cron-compatible entry at docs/schedule/cron.txt that runs the pipeline at 07:30 Monday–Friday, redirecting output to output/logs/run.log (single line only). Also include a simple runner (e.g., bin/run_daily.sh or similar) so I can invoke the scheduled job once manually with a flag (e.g., --once) to simulate the scheduled run.

4) Meeting notes: Using input/templates/meeting_notes_template.md, generate docs/meeting/weekly_notes.md that fills in the placeholders with (a) today’s date, (b) total responses across all inputs, (c) the list of regions found, (d) a small table or bullet list summarizing the latest gender shares by region from output/aggregates/gender_mix.csv, and (e) the validation statuses (schema_status and diff_status). Include at least two action items (one data-related, one scheduling-related). Append a short Schedule section that includes the exact cron line from docs/schedule/cron.txt.

5) Run it now for me: Please run your aggregation script once on the provided inputs and then run the validation/diff command so that the following artifacts exist and are populated for review: output/aggregates/gender_mix.csv, output/tests/schema_report.json, output/tests/diff.txt, docs/schedule/cron.txt, docs/meeting/weekly_notes.md, and output/logs/run.log (from the manual run).

Input files to use are included below. All outputs must be written to the paths specified above. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
